## Description

Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` ‚Äî New feature
- [ ] `fix` ‚Äî Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` ‚Äî Documentation
- [ ] `refactor` ‚Äî Refactor
- [ ] `chore` ‚Äî Maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Updated relevant README files
- [ ] Verified install instructions still work

## For Skill Changes

- [ ] `SKILL.md` updated if behavior changed
- [ ] `README.md` updated
- [ ] `README.ru.md` updated
- [ ] `agents/openai.yaml` checked
